confidence_threshold.title: Confidence Threshold

allowed_read_only_tools.description: List of read-only tools allowed during a reflex action.
allowed_read_only_tools.title: Allowed Read Only Tools

System1Reflex.title: System1Reflex

event_id.description: A unique identifier for the event.
event_id.title: Event Id

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

type.description: Discriminator type for a system fault event.
type.title: Type

SystemNode.description: A node representing a deterministic system capability.

description.description: A description of the node's function.
description.title: Description

intervention_policies.description: A declarative list of proactive oversight hooks bound to this node's lifecycle.
intervention_policies.title: Intervention Policies

SystemNode.title: SystemNode

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the required task.
task_id.title: Task Id

required_action_space_id.description: Optional restriction forcing bidders to possess a specific toolset.
required_action_space_id.title: Required Action Space Id

max_budget_cents.description: The absolute ceiling price the orchestrator is willing to pay.
max_budget_cents.title: Max Budget Cents

task_id.description: The identifier of the resolved task.
task_id.title: Task Id

awarded_syndicate.description: Strict mapping of agent NodeIDs to their exact fractional payout in cents.
awarded_syndicate.title: Awarded Syndicate

escrow.description: The conditional economic escrow locking the compute budget.

valid_from.description: The UNIX timestamp when this memory became true.
valid_from.title: Valid From

valid_to.description: The UNIX timestamp when this memory was invalidated.
valid_to.title: Valid To

interval_type.description: The Allen's interval algebra or causal relationship classification.

checkpoint_id.description: Unique identifier for the temporal anchor.
checkpoint_id.title: Checkpoint Id

ledger_index.description: The exact array index in the EpistemicLedger this checkpoint represents.
ledger_index.title: Ledger Index

state_hash.description: The canonical RFC 8785 SHA-256 hash of the entire topology at this exact index.
state_hash.title: State Hash

working_directory.description: The absolute path of the active shell context.
working_directory.title: Working Directory

stdout_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the standard output buffer at the moment of observation.
stdout_hash.title: Stdout Hash

stderr_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the standard error buffer.
stderr_hash.title: Stderr Hash

env_variables_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the active environment variables matrix.
env_variables_hash.title: Env Variables Hash

target_agent_id.description: The ID of the agent whose mind is being modeled.
target_agent_id.title: Target Agent Id

assumed_shared_beliefs.description: A list of SemanticNode IDs that the modeling agent assumes the target already possesses.
assumed_shared_beliefs.title: Assumed Shared Beliefs

identified_knowledge_gaps.description: Specific topics or logical premises the target agent is assumed to be missing.
identified_knowledge_gaps.title: Identified Knowledge Gaps

empathy_confidence_score.description: The mathematical confidence (0.0 to 1.0) the agent has in its model of the target's mind.
empathy_confidence_score.title: Empathy Confidence Score

branch_id.description: Unique identifier for this line of reasoning.
branch_id.title: Branch Id

parent_branch_id.description: The branch this thought diverged from, enabling tree reconstruction.
parent_branch_id.title: Parent Branch Id

latent_content_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the raw scratchpad text generated in this branch.
latent_content_hash.title: Latent Content Hash

prm_score.description: The logical validity score assigned to this branch by the Process Reward Model.
prm_score.title: Prm Score

ToolDefinition.description: Declarative mathematical definition of a tool.

tool_name.description: The exact identifier of the tool.
tool_name.title: Tool Name

description.description: Semantic description of what the tool does, used by the LLM for selection.
description.title: Description

input_schema.description: The strict JSON Schema dictionary defining the required arguments.
input_schema.title: Input Schema

side_effects.description: The declarative side-effect and idempotency profile of the tool.

permissions.description: The zero-trust security boundaries for the tool's execution.

ToolDefinition.title: ToolDefinition

batch_id.description: Unique identifier for this telemetry snapshot.
batch_id.title: Batch Id

spans.description: A collection of execution spans to be serialized.
spans.title: Spans

decay_propagation_rate.description: The percentage of confidence mathematically lost per edge traversal during a defeasible cascade.
decay_propagation_rate.title: Decay Propagation Rate

epistemic_quarantine_threshold.description: The minimum certainty boundary. If an event's propagated confidence drops below this threshold, it is legally quarantined.
epistemic_quarantine_threshold.title: Epistemic Quarantine Threshold

enforce_cross_agent_quarantine.description: If True, the orchestrator must automatically emit global QuarantineOrders to sever infected SemanticEdges across the swarm to prevent epistemic contagion.
enforce_cross_agent_quarantine.title: Enforce Cross Agent Quarantine

dimensionality.description: The size of the vector array.
dimensionality.title: Dimensionality

model_name.description: The provenance of the embedding model used (e.g., 'text-embedding-3-large').
model_name.title: Model Name

VerifiableEntropy.description: Passive cryptographic envelope for verifiable random functions.

vrf_proof.description: The zero-knowledge cryptographic proof of fair random generation.
vrf_proof.title: Vrf Proof

public_key.description: The public key of the oracle or node used to verify the VRF proof.
public_key.title: Public Key

seed_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the origin seed used to initialize the VRF.
seed_hash.title: Seed Hash

VerifiableEntropy.title: VerifiableEntropy

WorkflowEnvelope.description: The root envelope for an orchestrated workflow payload.

manifest_version.description: The semantic version of this workflow manifestation schema.

topology.description: The underlying topology governing execution routing.

governance.description: Macro-economic circuit breakers and TTL limits for the swarm.

tenant_id.description: The enterprise tenant boundary for this execution.
tenant_id.title: Tenant Id

session_id.description: The ephemeral session boundary for this execution.
session_id.title: Session Id

max_risk_tolerance.description: The absolute maximum enterprise risk threshold permitted for this topology.

allowed_data_classifications.description: The declarative whitelist of data classifications permitted to flow through this graph.
allowed_data_classifications.title: Allowed Data Classifications

federated_sla.description: The B2B Service Level Agreement contract that must be mathematically satisfied before multi-tenant graph coupling.

pq_signature.description: The quantum-resistant signature securing the root execution graph.

WorkflowEnvelope.title: WorkflowEnvelope

system_prompt.description: The active system prompt guiding the agent's behavior.
system_prompt.title: System Prompt

active_context.description: A dictionary representing the active context variables for the agent.
active_context.title: Active Context

argumentation.description: The formal graph of non-monotonic claims and defeasible attacks currently active in the swarm's working memory.

theory_of_mind_models.description: Empathetic models of other agents to compress and target outgoing communications.
theory_of_mind_models.title: Theory Of Mind Models

proof_protocol.description: The mathematical dialect of the cryptographic proof.
proof_protocol.title: Proof Protocol

public_inputs_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the public inputs (e.g., prompt, Lamport clock) anchoring this proof to the specific state index.
public_inputs_hash.title: Public Inputs Hash

verifier_key_id.description: The identifier of the public evaluation key the orchestrator must load to verify this proof.
verifier_key_id.title: Verifier Key Id

cryptographic_blob.description: The base64-encoded succinct cryptographic proof payload.
cryptographic_blob.title: Cryptographic Blob

latent_state_commitments.description: Cryptographic bindings (hashes) of intermediate residual stream states to prevent activation spoofing.
latent_state_commitments.title: Latent State Commitments
